prompt: Design a meme featuring a given image on the left, and on the right, two vertically stacked text captions that contrast a tech worker's state before and after being laid off.
prompt_refined: Generate a meme formatted as a two-panel image. The left panel should display image 1, serving as the visual component. The right panel should contain two text captions, stacked vertically. The top caption should describe a tech worker's state *before* being laid off, and the bottom caption should describe their state *after* being laid off. The captions must create a clear contrast between these two states, conceptually mirroring the differing expressions shown in image 1.
objects: left panel containing a visual component
image of a man with a smiling expression (in the left panel)
image of a man with a serious expression (in the left panel)
man wearing a teal and white tracksuit top
top text caption (in the right panel)
bottom text caption (in the right panel)
